title: Breadstick
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Breadsticks''' were thin sticks of bread.

In [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] ate these in [[Keben Park]] on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] while planning to assassinate [[Thrackan Sal-Solo]]. He also fed the crumbs of the breadsticks to nearby [[Glider (creature)|gliders]]. [[Lon Shevu]] liked breadsticks filled with fruit preserves.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Bloodlines]]'' {{1st}}
*[[Legacy of the Force: Bloodlines (abridged audiobook)|''Legacy of the Force: Bloodlines'' abridged audiobook]]
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]''
*[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice (abridged audiobook)|''Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice'' abridged audiobook]]
